error_signature: dropdown value not preserved on navigation
title: Dropdown value not preserved when navigating between tabs
symptom: When navigating between tabs, the selected value in the dropdown resets to unselected. Users expect their selection to remain intact.
applies_when: Using a tab container with dropdowns
Navigating back and forth between tabs
not_this_if: Dropdown values are preserved in other components or contexts
root_cause: The dropdown component does not maintain its state across tab navigations, leading to a loss of the selected value. This is a common issue when the component's state is not properly managed during navigation events.
fix_steps: Create an 'On change' workflow for the dropdown select component.
Store the selected value in a variable within the workflow.
Bind this variable to the initial value of the dropdown select component.
agent_instruction: Implement an 'On change' workflow to store and bind the dropdown value to preserve it during tab navigation.
